name: PaymentProblems
description: Customer has made a payment or is expecting a payment to process and there is a problem — the payment isn't showing, was taken incorrectly, or they want to confirm it went through. Also covers queries about late payment fees and problems with the payment system. This is not about making a new payment, setting up a payment method, changing payment dates, or requesting a payment extension.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I made a payment but it's {paymentProblemType} on my account
Can you check if my payment has gone through?
My payment is {paymentProblemType}
I paid my bill but it's still showing as unpaid
Why hasn't my payment been applied to my account?
I want to {paymentProblemType} that was made yesterday
The wrong amount was taken from my account
I've been charged a {paymentProblemType} — can you explain why?
My direct debit went out but the balance hasn't changed
I can see the payment left my bank but it's not on my Virgin account
How long does it take for a payment to show on my account?
I'm getting a {paymentProblemType} even though I paid on time
There's a {paymentProblemType} — I can't complete my payment online
My payment was taken on the wrong date
I need to query a payment that doesn't look right
Why was more money taken than my usual bill amount?
I made a payment over the phone and it hasn't appeared yet
Can you confirm you received my payment of {amount} ?
The payment I made last week still isn't showing
I'm being told I owe money but I've already paid
Why have I been charged a late fee when my payment went through?
payment not showing
